title: cyclosorus nitidulus
intro: Cyclosorus nitidulus is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. Cyclosorus nitidulus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a poultice or topical application.
